socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a wall of force which allies and enemies can pass through, but allied projectiles which can collide with enemies will also collide with this wall, and can chain from it to other targets. Projectiles can only collide with a single Wall of Force, and no more than once.
explicitMods:
Projectiles cannot Split, Pierce, or Fork when colliding with the wall
Projectiles can Chain an additional time when colliding with the wall
Projectiles can only chain to targets on the same side of the wall
Projectiles which have collided with the wall deal 19% less Damage
Wall is destroyed after 17 Projectile collisions
